channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Geopolitical news headlines curated from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇯🇵 Japan wholesale inflation hits 3-year high as Iran war drives energy prices
item.description: Japanese wholesale inflation accelerated at the fastest pace in three years in April as the Iran conflict boosted oil and chemical prices, strengthening the case for a central bank rate hike as soon as June.. Source: Reuters. Category: Economy

item.title: 🇨🇳🇺🇸 China halts US beef export licenses hours after Trump-Xi summit approval
item.description: Chinese customs appeared to halt export clearances for hundreds of US beef plants just hours after Reuters reported the long-awaited licenses had been approved during the Trump-Xi summit in Beijing.. Source: Reuters. Category: US-China

item.title: 💰 US expects double-digit billions in Chinese farm purchases after summit
item.description: The US expects China to sign up to buy double-digit billions worth of American farm goods following the Trump-Xi summit in Beijing, according to US Trade Representative Jamieson Greer.. Source: Reuters. Category: US-China

item.title: 🇲🇦 Morocco adds B to budget to cushion Middle East conflict impact
item.description: The Moroccan government plans to add 20 billion dirhams to its 2026 budget to finance measures cushioning the impact of the Middle East conflict on the domestic market.. Source: Reuters. Category: Middle East

item.title: 🇮🇶 Iraq seeks IMF and World Bank financial assistance amid Iran war fallout
item.description: Iraqi officials have approached the International Monetary Fund about securing financial assistance as a result of the Middle East conflict, according to a source close to the IMF.. Source: Reuters. Category: Middle East

item.title: 🇺🇸🇵🇱 US cancels planned deployment of 4,000 troops to Poland
item.description: Pentagon scraps temporary troop deployment to Poland, surprising lawmakers and raising questions about US commitment to European defense amid Iran war tensions.. Source: The Star. Category: Military

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK Labour MPs question whether party will survive as political force
item.description: Labour Party faces existential crisis with support at historic lows as internal revolt engulfs Keir Starmer's leadership, raising questions about Britain's political realignment.. Source: France 24. Category: Europe

item.title: 🇱🇾 Football unrest triggers protests in Libyan capital
item.description: Protests erupted in Tripoli after football match tensions, with demonstrators damaging parts of the prime minister's office building.. Source: Anadolu Agency. Category: Middle East

item.title: 🇺🇸 US Border Patrol chief Michael Banks resigns
item.description: The head of US Border Patrol steps down amid ongoing border security challenges and policy debates.. Source: Anadolu Agency. Category: US Politics

item.title: 🇸🇦⛪ Saudi Arabia condemns Israel over Al-Aqsa Mosque practices
item.description: Saudi foreign ministry denounces Israeli actions at Jerusalem's Al-Aqsa Mosque, calling them provocative amid ongoing regional tensions.. Source: Anadolu Agency. Category: Middle East

item.title: 🇫🇷🇰🇪 Macron Faces Backlash in Kenya Over Africa Investment Push
item.description: French President Emmanuel Macron announced a €23 billion investment package for Africa at the Kenya summit, but faced protests and criticism over Frances continued influence in former colonies.. Source: Washington Post. Category: Africa

item.title: 🇺🇦 Rescuers Pull Bodies From Kyiv Rubble After Massive Russian Attack
item.description: Emergency workers recovered bodies from the ruins of a flattened apartment block in Kyiv after Russia unleashed one of its largest drone barrages of the war.. Source: BBC. Category: Ukraine-Russia War

item.title: 🇹🇼 Taiwan responds to Trump-Xi summit: China should end military pressure
item.description: Taiwan said nothing surprising came from the Trump-Xi summit but called on China to end military pressure on the island, which Taipei views as the real threat to regional peace.. Source: Reuters. Category: US-China

item.title: 🇭🇺 Hungary summons Russian ambassador over drone attack that entered its airspace
item.description: Hungary summoned Russia's ambassador after a massive drone attack on Ukraine included drones that entered Hungarian airspace, marking a significant diplomatic escalation as Hungary maintains close ties with Moscow.. Source: AP News. Category: Ukraine-Russia War

item.title: 🇺🇳 UN humanitarian convoy hit by drone strikes in Ukraine's Kherson
item.description: A UN aid convoy delivering humanitarian assistance to Kherson was struck by drone attacks, highlighting the dangers faced by relief operations in conflict zones.. Source: Al Jazeera. Category: Ukraine-Russia War

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran urges BRICS to condemn US and Israel, Indian-flagged vessel sunk
item.description: Iran's foreign minister called on BRICS nations to condemn violations of international law by the US and Israel, while reports emerged of an Indian-flagged vessel being sunk amid escalating regional tensions.. Source: Reuters. Category: Middle East

item.title: 🇦🇪 Iran and UAE clash at BRICS foreign ministers meeting in Delhi
item.description: Iran's foreign minister accused the UAE of direct involvement in military operations against Iran during a BRICS meeting, escalating diplomatic tensions between Gulf states.. Source: Reuters. Category: Diplomacy

item.title: 🇮🇶 Iraq swears in new PM with partial cabinet as Iran war strains region
item.description: Prime Minister Ali al-Zaidi was sworn in with only a partial cabinet after lawmakers failed to agree on key postings including interior and defence, as the conflict in neighboring Iran creates regional instability.. Source: Reuters. Category: Middle East

item.title: 🇮🇳 India seeks US waiver extension for Russian oil imports amid Iran war
item.description: India has asked the U.S. to extend its waiver allowing purchases of Russian oil, Bloomberg reported, as the ongoing conflict in the Persian Gulf disrupts traditional energy supply routes.. Source: Reuters. Category: Energy

item.title: 🇱🇻 Latvian government collapses over Ukraine drone incident response
item.description: Prime Minister Evika Silina resigned Thursday, triggering coalition collapse months before October elections, amid criticism of her handling of airspace violations by Ukrainian drones during Russian attacks.. Source: Reuters. Category: Europe

item.title: 🛢️ Gazprom halts fuel output at Russian plant after drone strike
item.description: Gazproms Astrakhan gas processing plant stopped motor fuel production following a fire from a May 13 drone attack, highlighting the reach of aerial warfare into Russian energy infrastructure.. Source: Reuters. Category: Energy

item.title: ⛪ Pope Leo criticizes surge in European military spending as diplomacy betrayal
item.description: Pope Leo XIV denounced rising European defense budgets that grew by the highest amount since the Cold War, saying the investment in high-tech weaponry over peace efforts represents a betrayal of diplomacy.. Source: Reuters. Category: Europe

item.title: 🇹🇷🇮🇶 Türkiye Backs Iraq New Government Led by PM Al-Zaidi
item.description: Ankara expressed support for Iraq new administration, hoping it will strengthen regional stability and prosperity, reaffirming close cooperation between the two neighbors.. Source: TRT World. Category: Middle East

item.title: 🇹🇷🇺🇸🛡️ Ankara Summit to Mark New Chapter for Turkish-American NATO Alliance
item.description: Experts say the upcoming NATO Summit in Ankara will define a new era of Turkish-American cooperation within the alliance, with both countries playing leading roles in NATO transformation.. Source: Anadolu Agency. Category: Diplomacy

item.title: 🇷🇺🇺🇦⚔️ Russia Prison Population Falls as Convicts Sent to War
item.description: Ukraine Kyiv Independent reports that Russia prison population has declined significantly as convicts are recruited and sent to fight in Ukraine, revealing another dimension of Russian military manpower strategies.. Source: Kyiv Independent. Category: Ukraine-Russia War
